name: remotecc-claude-session
description: Manage remote Claude Code workspaces over SSH with persistent tmux sessions, rsync sync, readiness gates, blocker approval, model routing, and Codex-friendly observation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Run recoverable Claude Code sessions on remote hosts from Codex.
interface.longDescription: RemoteCC mirrors a local workspace to a remote host, starts Claude Code inside a persistent tmux session, routes model choice explicitly, exposes ready/observe machine gates, handles common Claude approval blockers, and pulls remote edits back through a predictable rsync workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use RemoteCC to create a remote Claude session for this project.
Use RemoteCC ready and observe to check a remote Claude run.
Use RemoteCC to pull completed remote Claude edits back locally.
